parameters.formDescription: Upload a CV/Resume (PDF) for instant AI-powered analysis. Results will be emailed to you.

options.formSubmittedText: CV received successfully! The AI is analyzing it now. Results will be sent to your email within 1-2 minutes.

parameters.jsCode:
const pdfOutput = $input.first().json;
const cvText = pdfOutput.text || pdfOutput.data || pdfOutput.content || JSON.stringify(pdfOutput);

const formData = $('CV Upload Form').first().json;
const candidateName = formData['Candidate Name'] || formData['candidateName'] || formData['candidate_name'] || 'Unknown';
const recipientEmail = formData['Recipient Email'] || formData['recipientEmail'] || formData['recipient_email'] || '';
const jobPosition = formData['Job Position'] || formData['jobPosition'] || formData['job_position'] || '';

if (!recipientEmail) {
  throw new Error('Recipient email is missing! Please fill in the email field.');
}

let positionContext = '';
if (jobPosition && jobPosition.trim() !== '') {
  positionContext = `\n\nIMPORTANT: The candidate is specifically applying for the role of: ${jobPosition}\nProvide EXTRA DETAILED analysis of how well they fit this specific role.`;
}

const prompt = `You are a smart HR agent and expert CV/Resume analyst with years of experience evaluating candidates across all industries. Analyze the following CV/Resume thoroughly and provide a professional assessment.${positionContext}

========== CV/RESUME CONTENT ==========
${cvText}
========== END OF CV ==========

Provide your complete analysis in this EXACT format:

============================================
         AI CV ANALYSIS REPORT
============================================

CANDIDATE OVERVIEW
  Name: [Extract from CV]
  Email: [Extract from CV]
  Phone: [Extract from CV]
  Location: [Extract from CV]
  LinkedIn/Portfolio: [Extract if available, otherwise N/A]

SKILLS ANALYSIS
  Technical Skills: [List all technical/hard skills]
  Soft Skills: [List all soft skills identified from experience]
  Tools & Technologies: [List specific tools, software, frameworks]
  Programming Languages: [List if applicable]
  Spoken Languages: [List languages]
  Certifications: [List any certifications or courses]

EXPERIENCE SUMMARY
  Total Years of Experience: [Estimate from work history]
  Current/Latest Role: [Most recent job title at company]
  Key Positions:
    - [Job Title] at [Company] ([Duration]) - [One line achievement]
    - [Job Title] at [Company] ([Duration]) - [One line achievement]
    - [Job Title] at [Company] ([Duration]) - [One line achievement]
  Industries: [List all industries worked in]
  Notable Achievements:
    - [Key achievement 1]
    - [Key achievement 2]
    - [Key achievement 3]

EDUCATION
  - [Degree/Qualification] from [Institution] ([Year])
  - [Additional education if any]

TOP 5 STRENGTHS
  1. [Strength] - [Why this is a strength based on CV evidence]
  2. [Strength] - [Why this is a strength based on CV evidence]
  3. [Strength] - [Why this is a strength based on CV evidence]
  4. [Strength] - [Why this is a strength based on CV evidence]
  5. [Strength] - [Why this is a strength based on CV evidence]

AREAS FOR IMPROVEMENT
  1. [Area] - [Specific suggestion to improve]
  2. [Area] - [Specific suggestion to improve]
  3. [Area] - [Specific suggestion to improve]

MOST RELEVANT JOB ROLE
  Suggested Role: [e.g., ML Engineer, Frontend Developer, Data Analyst, etc.]
  Why This Role: [2-3 sentences explaining the fit]
  Role Fit Score: [X]/10
${jobPosition ? `\nFIT FOR ${jobPosition.toUpperCase()}\n  Match Score: [X]/10\n  Matching Skills: [List skills that match]\n  Missing Skills: [List skills they lack]\n  Recommendation: [Hire / Consider / Not a fit] with reasoning` : ''}

JOB FIT SCORES (1-10)
  Software Development:    [X]/10
  Data Science/AI/ML:      [X]/10
  Project Management:      [X]/10
  Marketing/Sales:         [X]/10
  Design/Creative:         [X]/10
  DevOps/Cloud:            [X]/10
  Consulting:              [X]/10

OVERALL CV SCORE: [XX]/100

HIRING RECOMMENDATION
  Verdict: [STRONG HIRE / HIRE / MAYBE / PASS]
  Hiring Message: [2-3 sentence professional assessment that could be used as internal hiring notes or sent to the candidate. Be specific about why they should or should not be hired.]

CV IMPROVEMENT TIPS
  1. [Specific actionable tip]
  2. [Specific actionable tip]
  3. [Specific actionable tip]
  4. [Specific actionable tip]
  5. [Specific actionable tip]

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
[3-4 sentence overall assessment covering the candidate's potential, best career path, and final recommendation]

============================================`;

return [{
  json: {
    prompt,
    candidateName,
    recipientEmail,
    jobPosition: jobPosition || 'General'
  }
}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a smart HR agent and expert CV/Resume analyst. Provide detailed, well-structured, professional analysis. Follow the exact format requested. Be thorough but concise.' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }], temperature: 0.3, max_tokens: 4000 }) }}
